title: Spotlight | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Spotlight
NYU Shanghai Community Shares Resolutions for 2021New beginnings and new resolutions for 2021!
What I'm Thankful ForMembers of the NYU Shanghai community on what they were most thankful for this year.
Chemistry for All Students from all majors take the chemistry class "Energy and the Environment."
Student art installation explores what becomes of our data after deathHow is death circulated on the Internet? A student research project explores digital bereavement.
Health Ambassadors Keep NYU Shanghai #HealthyTogetherMeet some of the students who are working hard to keep NYU Shanghai #healthytogether.
Who are the Class of 2024? Meet some members of the classFour members of the class shared their thoughts on their paths to Shanghai and their hopes for the future.
Examining China’s Global Environmental Leadership PotentialNYU Shanghai Professor Yifei Li analyzes what makes and breaks China's "ecological civilization" policies.
Real Talk Goes Virtual in Reality Show 2020Cast members crafted the first-ever virtual edition of the Reality Show on Zoom from their homes.
Fall Book Roundup: 8 New Works from NYU Shanghai Faculty + a Podcast Here are some titles to consider adding to your library.
Journalist Ray Suarez on the “Changing Complexion” of U.S. PoliticsThe veteran broadcaster showed how U.S. demographics both explain Trumpism's rise and forecast its fall.
Thank You, Chancellor Yu!Looking back fondly on the road that Chancellor Emeritus Yu Lizhong and NYU Shanghai traveled together.
76 Days in WuhanNYU Shanghai students share their stories from the epicenter of China’s COVID-19 epidemic.
A Global Virtual Showcase to Close the 2020 Spring SemesterDesigning everything from puzzles for the visually-impaired to digital art inspired by a swivel chair.
End-of-Semester Shows: An Online Creative FeastStudents in the visual arts, music, and dance classes shared their final projects online.
Course Spotlight: Network AnalyticsApplying network analytics to solve business problems.
